problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
